All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Exception Summary 
    Class Description
    ApplicationExceptionHandlerCtl
    Handles application propagated exceptions
    AttachmentDAOImpl
    DAO implementation for managing AttachmentDTO persistence operations in the ORS application.
    AttachmentDAOInt
    DAO interface for Attachment-related data access operations in the ORS application.
    AttachmentDTO
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a file attachment entity in the ORS application.
    AttachmentServiceImpl
    Service implementation class for managing attachment operations.
    AttachmentServiceInt
    Service interface for managing attachment operations.
    BaseCtl<T extends BaseDTO,​S extends BaseServiceInt<T>,​F extends BaseForm<T>>
    Generic base controller providing common CRUD operations for all ORS controllers.
    BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>
    Abstract base implementation of BaseDAOInt providing common JPA-based data access operations for all DAO classes in the ORS application.
    BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    Generic base DAO interface defining standard data access operations for all entities in the ORS application.
    BaseDTO
    Abstract base class for all DTO (Data Transfer Object) entities in the ORS application.
    BaseForm<T extends BaseDTO>
    Generic base form class used to carry input data from the client to the controller layer in the ORS application.
    BaseServiceImpl<T extends BaseDTO,​D extends BaseDAOInt<T>>
    Generic base service implementation providing transactional business logic for common CRUD operations in the ORS application.
    BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    Generic base service interface defining standard business logic operations for all service classes in the ORS application.
    ChangePasswordForm
    Form class for handling change password requests in the ORS application.
    CollegeCtl
    REST controller for managing College-related operations in the ORS application.
    CollegeDAOImpl
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for CollegeDTO in the ORS application.
    CollegeDAOInt
    DAO interface for CollegeDTO in the ORS application.
    CollegeDTO
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a College entity in the ORS application.
    CollegeForm
    Form class for handling College add and update requests in the ORS application.
    CollegeServiceImpl
    Service implementation class for managing college operations.
    CollegeServiceInt
    Service interface for managing college operations.
    CourseCtl
    REST controller for managing Course-related operations in the ORS application.
    CourseDAOImpl
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for CourseDTO in the ORS application.
    CourseDAOInt
    DAO interface for CourseDTO in the ORS application.
    CourseDTO
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a Course entity in the ORS application.
    CourseForm
    Form class for handling Course add and update requests in the ORS application.
    CourseServiceImpl
    Service implementation class for managing course operations.
    CourseServiceInt
    Service interface for managing course operations.
    DatabaseException  
    DropdownList
    Interface representing a contract for objects that can be used to populate dropdown lists in the ORS application.
    DuplicateRecordException  
    EmailBuilder
    EmailBuilder is a utility class for creating HTML email messages for user registration, password recovery, and password change notifications.
    EmailMessage
    EmailMessage is a simple JavaBean class representing an email message.
    EmailUtility
    EmailUtility is a utility class for sending emails using SMTP.
    FacultyCtl
    REST controller for managing Faculty-related operations in the ORS application.
    FacultyDAOImpl
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for FacultyDTO in the ORS application.
    FacultyDAOInt
    DAO interface for FacultyDTO in the ORS application.
    FacultyDTO
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a Faculty entity in the ORS application.
    FacultyForm
    Form class for handling Faculty add and update requests in the ORS application.
    FacultyServiceImpl
    Service implementation class for managing faculty operations.
    FacultyServiceInt
    Service interface for managing faculty operations.
    ForgetPasswordForm
    Form class for handling forgot password requests.
    JasperCtl
    The Class JasperCtl.
    JWTRequestFilter
    JWT request filter that intercepts every incoming HTTP request to validate the JWT token and establish the security context for the ORS application.
    JWTUserDetailsService
    Service class for loading user details during JWT authentication.
    JWTUtil
    Utility class for generating, validating, and extracting claims from JSON Web Tokens (JWT) in the ORS application.
    LoginCtl
    REST controller for handling authentication-related operations in the ORS application.
    LoginForm
    Form class for handling user login requests.
    MarksheetCtl
    REST controller for managing Marksheet-related operations in the ORS application.
    MarksheetDAOImpl
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for MarksheetDTO in the ORS application.
    MarksheetDAOInt
    DAO interface for MarksheetDTO in the ORS application.
    MarksheetDTO
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a Marksheet entity in the ORS application.
    MarksheetForm
    Form class for handling marksheet operations.
    MarksheetServiceImpl
    Session facade of Role Service.
    MarksheetServiceInt
    College Service interface.
    MyProfileForm
    Form class for handling user profile operations.
    ORSProject10Application
    Entry point for the ORS Project 10 Spring Boot application.
    ORSResponse
    Represents a standardized API response object used across all ORS controllers.
    RoleCtl
    REST controller for managing Role-related operations in the ORS application.
    RoleDAOImpl
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for RoleDTO in the ORS application.
    RoleDAOint
    DAO interface for RoleDTO in the ORS application.
    RoleDTO
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a Role entity in the ORS application.
    RoleForm

    RoleServiceImpl
    Service implementation class for managing role operations.
    RoleServiceInt
    Service interface for managing role operations.

    Form class for handling timetable operations.

    Service implementation class for managing timetable operations.
    TimetableServiceInt
    Service interface for managing timetable operations.
    UserContext
    Represents the context of the currently authenticated user in the ORS application.
    UserContextHolder
    Utility class for storing and retrieving the UserContext on a per-thread basis using a ThreadLocal variable.
    UserCtl
    REST controller for managing User-related operations in the ORS application.
    UserDAOImpl
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for UserDTO in the ORS application.
    UserDAOInt
    DAO interface for UserDTO in the ORS application.
    UserDTO
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a User entity in the ORS application.
    UserForm
    Form class for handling user operations.
    UserRegistrationForm
    Form class for handling user registration requests.
    UserServiceImpl
    Service implementation class for managing user operations.
    UserServiceInt
    Service interface for managing user operations.
    WebSecurityConfig
    Spring Security configuration class for the ORS application.
